note: Intended-design diagram from phase ①: the upgraded /gogo:view renderer pipeline — mermaid lays out, we parse its SVG into a {nodes,edges} model and own interaction (token-styled nodes, owned edge layer with live re-routing, drag, minimap, persisted layout), with a graceful fallback for non-flowchart kinds.

diagrams.title: Interactive viewer pipeline: mermaid layout → parse to model → custom render + interact (xplan-style, seeded from mermaid)
